markdownRemark.html:
Hi everybody, I’m Giulia and with this very short post I’m going to open my blog, that I will mainly use to write about coding, machine & deep learning, Linux-related stuff and - why not - my hobbies :).
I will collect here tutorials, info, advice, projects or any new thing I will encounter in my path as a lifelong learner, hoping that my posts will be helpful to anybody that will take a moment of their time to read.
I believe this is a good day to start a project of this kind, since in Italy we start with the Phase 2 of the COVID-19 lockdown, so guys, stay safe and

May the 4th Be With You!

frontmatter.description: Hi everybody, I'm Giulia and with this very short post I'm going to open my blog, that I will mainly use to write about coding, machine & deep learning, Linux-related stuff and - why not - my hobbies.
frontmatter.title: An Introduction
